description: Analyze blood pressure readings collected over several weeks, calculate averages by time of day, identify concerning patterns, and flag readings that exceed medical thresholds. Work with realistic health data including missing entries and contextual notes. Save the analysis and flagged readings to ~/Documents/blood_pressure_report.csv.

natural_language.prompt: Analyze the blood pressure log to calculate overall averages, morning vs evening averages, categorize readings by medical thresholds, count concerning readings, and apply conditional formatting to highlight high values.
